label: Surveillance API
info: Exposes YOLO detections via HTTP for PC integration

name: Get Latest Detections
Connect your YOLO model output here ↓
info: Link from your existing model node to the 'Store Detections' node below

name: Store Detections
📋 SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
info:
## How to connect:

1. Find your existing YOLO model node in Node-RED
2. Draw a wire from the model output to 'Store Detections' node
3. Deploy the flow
4. Test by visiting: http://192.168.42.1:1880/detections

## Your PC will now receive detections via HTTP!

The Python code calls this endpoint to get bounding boxes,
so it doesn't need to run YOLO locally.
